name: Qube Holdings Limited
description: Qube Holdings Limited is Australia’s largest provider of integrated import and export logistics services. The company operates as a diversified logistics and infrastructure business, focusing on supply chain solutions across various sectors, including bulk, ports, logistics, infrastructure, and property. With a significant presence spanning Australia, New Zealand, and South-East Asia, Qube manages complex logistics operations supported by a workforce of approximately 10,000 employees. Headquartered in Sydney, the company plays a critical role in facilitating trade by connecting domestic and international markets through its extensive network of infrastructure and specialized logistics services.
